consensus_notes: 本次MDT协商共纳入 3 个专科：内分泌/代谢, 神经, 心血管。
初始主导专科为 内分泌/代谢，但最终方案由各专科交叉审阅后形成。
交叉审阅阶段共标记 0 个需降权或复核的候选药物。
共识阶段生成 3 个候选方案，并交由安全审核智能体进一步筛查。

triggered_risks.baseline_interpretation: 该风险由外部治疗风险知识和入院后首 24 小时检验共同识别，表示患者入院早期已经存在的基线风险背景。
triggered_risks.causality_statement: 该风险不表示候选药物导致检验异常。
triggered_risks.contraindication_or_caution: 强化降糖或激素治疗前需评估低血糖和高血糖风险
triggered_risks.monitoring_advice: 监测床旁血糖酮体和进食状态
triggered_risks.reference_source: ADA Standards of Care; DailyMed insulin labels
triggered_risks.plan_adaptation: 用于评估候选方案是否适合当前基线风险背景；中度风险以提示和监测为主，高风险才考虑显著降权或排除。

内分泌/代谢: Cerebral infarction due to unspecified occlusion or stenosis of right middle cerebral artery
Cerebral infarction due to thrombosis of right middle cerebral artery
Facial weakness
Hyperlipidemia, unspecified
Occlusion and stenosis of right carotid artery
Patient room in hospital as the place of occurrence of the external cause
Type 2 diabetes mellitus without complications
神经: Contact with and (suspected) exposure to COVID-19
Hemiplegia, unspecified affecting left nondominant side
心血管: Nontraumatic intracerebral hemorrhage in hemisphere, cortical
Other surgical procedures as the cause of abnormal reaction of the patient, or of later complication, without mention of misadventure at the time of the procedure
Status post administration of tPA (rtPA) in a different facility within the last 24 hours prior to admission to current facility

consensus_notes: 本次MDT协商共纳入 3 个专科：内分泌/代谢, 神经, 心血管。
初始主导专科为 内分泌/代谢，但最终方案由各专科交叉审阅后形成。
交叉审阅阶段共标记 0 个需降权或复核的候选药物。
共识阶段生成 3 个候选方案，并交由安全审核智能体进一步筛查。

plans.rationale: 由各专科智能体交叉审阅后保留无明显冲突且共识度较高的建议。
